name: Astarion || Sanctuary
description:
Requested || Bad Ending Astarion

Sans tadpole, abandoned by his supposed "friends" and back to feeding on rats, Astarion has never felt so bitter. Desperately trying to avoid his "siblings" as they seek to drag him back to Cazador, Astarion begs for Sanctuary.

(To the one who requested this...this is so utterly tragic and awful. I always help Astarion kill Cazador in my playthroughs so I had no idea this was his ending if you didn't! I hope you enjoy helping this poor man x)

♡♡♡

Join my Discord!

Request Form

☆☆☆

Tags: BG3, Baldur's Gate, Post Game, non-ascended, abandoned Astarion, Tav was an asshole Paladan who refused to help him kill Cazador, the Rat Diet, he cannot feed from thinking creatures, no more sunshine, angst, tragedy, hurt/comfort, bitter boi, Cazador is hunting for him
creator: Switchnbate
